items.title: Amazon Raises $15 Billion In Oversubscribed Bond Sale Amid Surging AI Cost
items.description: Amazon is returning to the bond market with a $15 billion sale as it ramps up AI spending, joins rivals Meta and Oracle in a major tech borrowing wave, and draws strong investor demand despite rising infrastructure costs.

items.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: Stocks pulled back on Monday, with tech shares largely trading lower. That included Nvidia, which dropped about 2% ahead of its earnings on Wednesday.
